title: cuphea campestris
intro: Cuphea campestris, also known as the Large-flowered Cuphea, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Cuphea campestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cuphea campestris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
